motto: NEXUS is the firewall — operator-initiated egress only. ASM-fast probes, no shell deps, every session logged and lawful.
legal_notice: Use only on systems and networks you are authorized to access. NEXUS logs every session for operator accountability.

legal_framework.title: Computer Fraud and Abuse Act
legal_framework.requirement: No exceeding authorized access to obtain information from protected computers.
legal_framework.nexus_application: Outside tab requires explicit operator connect — no automated outbound scanning or credential stuffing.

legal_framework.title: Computer Fraud and Abuse Act
legal_framework.requirement: Knowingly causing damage to protected computers.
legal_framework.nexus_application: Harm-class ports (C2/shell relay ranges) blocked unless operator force-override with audit log.

legal_framework.title: Communications Act — CPNI
legal_framework.nexus_application: Session transcripts stay on local field drive; no third-party relay of probe output.

legal_framework.title: SSH Transport Layer Protocol
legal_framework.requirement: Encrypted transport for remote shell and port forwarding.
legal_framework.nexus_application: SSH probe uses BatchMode handshake only — no password automation; firewall permits ip:22 egress on operator action.

legal_framework.title: Cleartext Considered Obsolete
legal_framework.requirement: Use TLS for email submission and retrieval where available.
legal_framework.nexus_application: SMTP/IMAP/POP3 tools default to TLS ports (587, 993, 995); cleartext flagged in UI.

legal_framework.title: HTTP/1.1 Message Syntax
legal_framework.nexus_application: HTTPS preferred; HTTP probe is HEAD-only with connect timeout — no payload injection.

tools.label: SSH · Secure Shell
tools.hint: Encrypted remote shell. Provide username for handshake probe; use your terminal for interactive session after permit.

tools.label: Telnet · Legacy terminal
tools.hint: Cleartext — use only on trusted lab gear. Banner grab only; no credential send.

tools.label: SMTP · Mail submit
tools.hint: Submission with STARTTLS on 587. EHLO banner probe only.

tools.label: SMTP · Cleartext (25)
tools.hint: Legacy MTA port — cleartext. Operator warning shown.

tools.label: HTTPS · Web
tools.hint: TLS web reachability — HEAD request only.

tools.label: HTTP · Web (cleartext)
tools.hint: Cleartext HTTP — HEAD only. Prefer HTTPS.

tools.label: DNS · UDP query
tools.hint: External resolver probe — use Truth DNS on loopback for normal resolution.

tools.label: NTP · Time sync
tools.hint: UDP reachability — ntpdate-style probe if available.

tools.label: FTP · File transfer
tools.hint: Banner grab only — cleartext control channel.

tools.label: Custom · TCP/UDP port
tools.hint: Specify host, port, and protocol. Harm-class ports require force override.
